red_flags.flag: Deck claims 3,100 active installations but public registry lifetime downloads (2,900) are below that figure, suggesting traction metrics may be overstated.
$18k MRR and 40% MoM growth are deck-only claims with no independent corroboration attached.

rationale: Ferrite is clearly in thesis: EU pre-seed devtools/AI-infra with a technical solo founder and independently verified shipping velocity (GitHub cadence, hackathon win, launch engagement). The advance pole is real product momentum without relying on the deck. The reject pole is equally grounded: independent registry data contradicts the deck's installation scale, and revenue traction is unverified—commercial credibility is genuinely in tension, not merely thin.
